title: Fermented Ackee Stir Fry
description: A twist on traditional ackee recipes, this fermented ackee stir fry brings a tangy flavor and crunchy texture. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Crunchy Vegetable Mix
ingredients.notes: such as carrots and bell peppers

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the crunchy vegetable mix and stir-fry until tender.
Add the fermented ackee and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the fry sauce, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
